arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Outpost.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the Outpost is located.

availability_zone_id.description: The ID of the availability zone where the Outpost is located.

description.description: A brief description of the Outpost.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Outpost.

lifecycle_status.description: The current lifecycle status of the Outpost.

name.description: The name assigned to the Outpost.

site_arn.description: The ARN of the site associated with the Outpost.

site_id.description: The ID of the site associated with the Outpost.

supported_hardware_type.description: The type of hardware supported by the Outpost.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Outpost.
